extraction.one_line_summary: MASNADA Fausto attacked with CONTI Valerio over 10km from climb summit, cooperated until final meters when MASNADA took the sprint
tactical_patterns: MASNADA and CONTI executed dual-objective cooperation: trading pulls for stage win and maglia rosa respectively until final 500m.
UAE Emirates allowed breakaway over 5 minutes specifically to plant CONTI in pink jersey while defending ROGLIČ's top-10 position.
Early two-man move with 10km climbing remaining from 13-rider break preempted chasers' coordination attempts in wet conditions.

rider_signals.MASNADA Fausto: positive: identified tired faces in 13-rider break and launched decisive 10km attack, held off three chasers by 34 seconds
rider_signals.CONTI Valerio: positive: secured 5:21 advantage for maglia rosa by cooperating with MASNADA through final kilometer despite sacrificing stage win
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: crashed early stage, lost significant shorts fabric right side, UAE controlled tempo suggesting GC concern
rider_signals.ROJAS José Joaquín: neutral: bridged to chase group but finished 34 seconds behind winner, showed strength but poor positioning from break
